description_long: This nightstand is crafted from richly stained wood, featuring a deep reddish-brown finish that highlights the natural grain patterns. The front side includes a single drawer with a round brass knob and an open shelf below, providing both concealed and open storage options. The top surface is flat and bordered with subtle molding, suitable for placing lamps, books, or decorative items. The sides and back are solid wood panels with a framed design, giving the piece a sturdy and classic appearance. The legs are slightly tapered and integrated into the frame, adding a touch of elegance while maintaining stability. The overall design is traditional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, making it versatile for various urban settings.
description: A traditional wooden nightstand with a single drawer, open shelf, and rich reddish-brown finish. Features a flat top, framed panels, and tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a round knob, open shelf, and detailed molding on the top and legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with framed detailing and the depth of the nightstand.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, framed wood panel with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood panel and framed construction.
attribute_leg_design: tapered wooden legs integrated into the frame
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
